name: reverse_engineer_repo
description: Reverse engineer any public GitHub repository. Clones the repo, runs a 9-stage static analysis pipeline (Python/Java/C#/TypeScript/JavaScript parsers), and generates 5 professional output files: SDD JSON (14 sections), HTML stakeholder dashboard, Markdown report, quality evaluation, and manifest. Returns structured metrics and AI narrative.

repo_url.description: Full GitHub repository URL, e.g. https://github.com/owner/repo

mode.description: Analysis mode. 'heuristic' uses rule-based analysis (no API key required). 'ai' calls Claude API for executive summary, modernization roadmap, and business logic analysis.
